methodsAttempted.query: site:upm.es inteligencia artificial generativa ChatGPT normativa guía uso estudiantes docentes UPM
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found several official UPM institutional repository records for 2025 AI in education good-practice guides.
Verified the used records are hosted in Archivo Digital UPM, described by the repository footer as maintained by the Library at Universidad Politécnica de Madrid.

Opened the official repository PDF downloads for the teaching-guide integration guide and the ethical/responsible AI in education guide. Firecrawl PDF extraction timed out on one PDF, so source text was checked through the indexed PDF text view and repository pages.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery located UPM institutional repository good-practice guides on generative AI in education. The strongest sources are recommendations authored by UPM faculty and deposited in Archivo Digital UPM, but the PDFs themselves state they are author opinions and not official UPM recommendations; the staged claims therefore remain narrow and non-canonical.

artifacts.sourceTitle: ¿Cómo integrar en la guía docente el uso de Inteligencia Artificial? : Guía de Buenas Prácticas

artifacts.verificationNotes: Official Archivo Digital UPM PDF download for a 2025 educational manual. The source is useful for teaching guidance but explicitly says it is recommendations and author opinion, not an official UPM recommendation.

artifacts.verificationNotes: Official repository page, but the abstract frames the guide as introductory familiarization with generative AI rather than policy or assessable institutional guidance.

artifacts.notes: Rejected for claim evidence because it is an introductory generative-AI guide and does not add a clear policy, assessment, integrity, or institutional-use position beyond generic familiarization.

stopConditions: Stop after official UPM repository sources establish the source-status limitation and provide narrow education guidance claims.
Do not treat repository good-practice manuals as binding university policy because the PDFs disclaim official UPM recommendation status.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow source-status claim because the evidence directly states the non-official limitation. This is not a canonical policy finding.
Approved only as non-binding teaching guidance from an official repository guide; wording avoids saying UPM requires or formally permits specific AI uses.
artifacts.reviewNotes: Approved after narrowing as source_status because the source explicitly says these guides are recommendations/author opinions, not official UPM recommendations.

artifacts.title: Universidad Politécnica de Madrid AI Guidance Staged Review
artifacts.summary: The staged review found official UPM repository good-practice guides about generative AI in education. The evidence supports narrow non-binding teaching-guidance and source-status claims, because the guides explicitly say they are recommendations or author opinions and not official UPM recommendations.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central binding UPM-wide AI policy was identified in this crawl. The used guides are official repository sources but explicitly disclaim official UPM recommendation status.
Firecrawl PDF extraction timed out for the main PDF, so the worker relied on search discovery plus accessible official repository/PDF text views and did not stage raw PDFs.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
